acceptance_criteria:
1. render_structural entry point
2. String truncation with suffix
3. List capping with '... (+N more)'
4. Map capping with sorted keys
5. Class rendering in schema field order
6. Depth limiting with 'Type { ... }'
7. Union handling (resolved vs ambiguous)
8. Unit tests for each value type
9. cargo test passes
title: Implement structural fallback renderer

acceptance_criteria:
1. PromptPath struct with PathSegment variants
2. push_field, push_index, push_map_key methods (return new path)
3. Display impl produces 'a.b[0]["key"]' format
4. Clone is cheap (Vec clone)
5. Unit tests for path formatting
6. cargo test passes
title: Implement PromptPath for location tracking
